title: Agent Traces, GenAI Semantics, Token Usage, Cost, Privacy, and Diagnosis · Behavior Case: Token Cost Accounting
summary: Logs contain full prompts and secrets but omit tool arguments, approvals, retries, model version, token usage, cost, and causal links needed to diagnose a failure. Predict authority, model and API behavior, state, tool effects, budgets, privacy, safety, accessibility, failure, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the token cost accounting increment in privacy-safe reconstructable agent telemetry. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory…
objectives: Reconcile input, cached, output, reasoning where exposed, tool, retry, and total token usage to model and pricing version without hard-coded permanence.
Default to metadata and hashes; sample, minimize, redact, encrypt, access-control, retain, and delete prompt, result, and tool content only when approved.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-ai-agent-python cumulative safe evaluated AI agent portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python interaction, tool, policy, state, memory,
evaluation, telemetry, and recovery models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only.
Provider APIs, Gemini models, native google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic, HTTP, credentials,
host files, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, cost, privacy review,
and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentPolicy:
    stakeholder_task_id: str
    allowed_tool_names: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_steps: int = 12
    maximum_tool_calls: int = 8
    approval_required_for_writes: bool = True


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentEvidence:
    revision: str
    model_config_digest: str
    policy_digest: str
    evaluation_digest: str
    recovery_drill_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Safe evaluated Python AI agent portfolio ready"

content.code:
# Worked focus: agentpy-token-cost-accounting — Reconcile input, cached, output, reasoning where exposed, tool, retry, and total token usage to model and pricing version without hard-coded permanence.
# Evidence: agentpy-worked-agentpy-observability-token-cost-5
# Competency: agentpy-worked-agentpy-observability-token-cost-5.
# Case 9036: a privacy-minimized nonprofit workflow.
# Operating constraint: last valid checkpoint, audit trail, kill switch, and rollback path must survive failure.
# Changed case: introduce a sensitive action, poisoned memory, leaking log, or computer-use request and deny or pause it.
def worked_agentpy_observability_token_cost_5(invocations: int = 40, traced_invocations: int = 40, usage_records: int = 40, redacted_records: int = 40, unbounded_content_logs: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked5 = "worked5-5dekrow-9036"
    assert evidence_variant_worked5
    evidence_axes_worked5 = (
        "authorityworked5",
        "interaction9036",
        "tool5dekrow",
        "stateworked59036",
        "evaluation9036worked5",
        "recovery5dekrow9036",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked5)) == 6
    if invocations < 1 or traced_invocations < 0:
        return False, traced_invocations, "trace-count"
    if traced_invocations != invocations or usage_records != invocations:
        return False, usage_records, "telemetry-gap"
    if redacted_records != invocations:
        return False, redacted_records, "telemetry-redaction"
    if unbounded_content_logs > 0:
        return False, unbounded_content_logs, "content-log-leak"
    assert traced_invocations == invocations and usage_records == invocations
    return True, traced_invocations, "observable-agent-operations"

Browser code must not contact provider APIs, invoke Gemini models, import or claim native google-genai, google-adk, or Pydantic behavior, open sockets, read or write host files, use credentials, execute generated code, launch browsers, reach databases or telemetry backends, or claim live privacy, load, safety, cost, or production behavior; verify those boundaries later with Python 3.14.6, google-genai 2.11.0, google-adk 2.4.0, Pydantic 2.13.4, fixed provider fixtures, fake transports, controlled local services, disposable cloud projects, representative eval sets, accessibility, privacy and security review, load, canary, rollback, recovery, and release gates.

For Safe AI agents and Python Build Token Cost Accounting evidence · Theory Token Cost Accounting, keep Token Cost Accounting connected to executable Python model, interaction, tool, policy, state, approval, evaluation, security, deployment, and recovery decision evidence.

content.code:
# Evidence: agentpy-token-cost-accounting-ugkjuu
# Competency: agentpy-token-cost-accounting.
# Case 7046: a keyboard and screen-reader interaction review.
# Operating constraint: last valid checkpoint, audit trail, kill switch, and rollback path must survive failure.
# Changed case: introduce a sensitive action, poisoned memory, leaking log, or computer-use request and deny or pause it.
def evidence_agentpy_token_cost_accounting_ugkjuu(invocations: int = 40, traced_invocations: int = 40, usage_records: int = 40, redacted_records: int = 40, unbounded_content_logs: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_ugkjuu = "ugkjuu-uujkgu-7046"
    assert evidence_variant_ugkjuu
    evidence_axes_ugkjuu = (
        "authorityugkjuu",
        "interaction7046",
        "tooluujkgu",
        "stateugkjuu7046",
        "evaluation7046ugkjuu",
        "recoveryuujkgu7046",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_ugkjuu)) == 6
    if invocations < 1 or traced_invocations < 0:
        return False, traced_invocations, "trace-count"
    if traced_invocations != invocations or usage_records != invocations:
        return False, usage_records, "telemetry-gap"
    if redacted_records != invocations:
        return False, redacted_records, "telemetry-redaction"
    if unbounded_content_logs > 0:
        return False, unbounded_content_logs, "content-log-leak"
    assert traced_invocations == invocations and usage_records == invocations
    return True, traced_invocations, "observable-agent-operations"
